questions.question: What does "flock" mean?
options: a group of sheep or goats
questions.correct_answer: a group of sheep or goats
questions.explanation: "flock" means: a group of sheep or goats

questions.question: What does "ewe" mean?
options: a group of sheep or goats

questions.question: Fill in the blank: Punctuation marks guide the ______ through your sentences.
questions.explanation: The full sentence is: "Punctuation marks guide the reader through your sentences."

questions.question: Which of the following is TRUE about this topic?
options: Punctuation marks guide the reader through your sentences.
Commas separate different parts of a sentence, including expressions and introductory clauses.
Semi-colons link strongly connected main clauses.
Full stops and question marks end sentences or questions.
questions.correct_answer: Full stops and question marks end sentences or questions.
questions.explanation: Correct! "Full stops and question marks end sentences or questions." is one of the key things to remember.

questions.question: What does "vast" mean?
options: a group of sheep or goats
